text.title: Schedule Development Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping schedule state to a rule.

conclusion.verdict: apply three-point estimates on long activities

branch.when: verb_led_all == true AND pert_compliance == true AND links_typed == false
verb_led_all == true AND pert_compliance == true AND links_typed == true AND buffers_visible == false

conclusion.verdict: extract hidden padding into named buffers

branch.when: verb_led_all == true AND pert_compliance == true AND links_typed == true AND buffers_visible == true AND days_since_refresh > 14
verb_led_all == true AND pert_compliance == true AND links_typed == true AND buffers_visible == true AND days_since_refresh <= 14

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: verb_led_all=true, pert_compliance=true, links_typed=true, buffers_visible=true, days_since_refresh=3 → accept schedule.
